default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between CoachList and GrowthX to explore potential collaboration on content strategy and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CoachList is a complex, two-sided marketplace for sports training, fitness, and wellness services, recently secured funding and preparing for market launch](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in building AI-powered content engines, focusing on editorial and programmatic content creation to drive organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [CoachList has significant content opportunities but lacks in-house resources; GrowthX's services align well with their needs](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Both parties agreed to a follow-up meeting to discuss potential collaboration in more depth](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)

## Topics

### CoachList Platform Overview

  - [Two-sided marketplace for sports training, fitness instruction, and wellness services](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Complex platform with features for service providers (CRM, scheduling) and consumers (booking, family accounts)](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Global scope with detailed categorization of sports, disciplines, and geographies](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)
  - [Recently completed pilot with 150 trainers, now preparing for formal company launch](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### CoachList's Current Focus and Challenges

  - [Secured significant funding, transitioning from development to market launch phase](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Developed in-house tools for identifying and categorizing potential service providers (trainers, instructors)](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aiming to onboard 3,000-4,000 service providers monthly](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Exploring outbound strategies, including email campaigns and LinkedIn outreach](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Recognizes importance of content but hasn't fully developed this area yet](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)

### GrowthX's Services and Approach

  - [Specializes in building AI-powered content engines for brands](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Services include strategy development, content creation, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1589.0)
  - [Uses a blend of AI automation and human expertise to ensure high-quality output](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Starts with a 6-8 week strategy sprint to develop roadmap, personas, and content guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Capable of handling high-volume, daily publishing of content](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content strategy and creation for CoachList's platform and blog](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1421.0)
  - [Leveraging GrowthX's AI-driven workflows for efficient content production](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Exploring programmatic content opportunities to build domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Potential for expanding into distribution and conversion optimization strategies](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Friday at 10 AM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare more detailed examples and opportunities specific to CoachList](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
  - [Discuss potential engagement timeline, noting GrowthX's current demand and booking schedule](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=2036.0)
  - [CoachList to consider priorities and resource allocation for content strategy vs. other growth initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/VRd1QmNyrnEw76e_eAZJ24wjtnMSd3uG?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)

action_items.description: Schedule 45-min follow-up meeting for Friday 10 AM Pacific; send invite to Jeff
